title: Power intelligent agents with AI-native databases
summary: Google Cloud Tech argues that AI-native databases are essential for powering intelligent agents with enterprise data. The video explores how such databases enable relevant context, multimodal queries, graph RAG, and integration with standards like Model Context Protocol to streamline agent deployment.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech makes the case that AI-native databases are necessary infrastructure for powering intelligent agents with enterprise data. The video covers how these databases supply relevant context, support multimodal queries, and enable graph retrieval-augmented generation. It also addresses integration with standards like Model Context Protocol to streamline agent deployment.
